description: Curated source-master input for the next Yomira source pack compilation. Files under definitions/ are source-pack-ready overlays; other entries document HTTP targets that need connector/profile work before they should be advertised as installable.

notes: Existing hand-authored config worked in testing.
Keiyoushi metadata confirms a simple Madara source at https://harimanga.me.
Keiyoushi marks this source NSFW, so the normalized definition does too.
Already present in the generated expanded pack.
Tracked here as a curated overlay so future master compilation preserves current Keiyoushi metadata and NSFW handling.
Keiyoushi metadata confirms MangaBox lineage at https://www.mangakakalot.gg.
Normalized as an inline selector Source Definition so it does not require an external bridge.
Browser Verification is declared because the existing hand-authored config marked the source as Cloudflare-sensitive.

Normalized as an inline selector Source Definition so it does not require an external bridge.

No external bridge or executable runtime is required.
Keiyoushi metadata confirms Hiperdex at https://hiperdex.com.

Browser Verification is declared as a possible recovery path, but normal requests are attempted first.

No external bridge or executable runtime is required.
Normalized from the existing Hentai20 selector config.
Marked 18+ and app-store-safe because it is declarative and contains no executable bridge code.
Browser Verification is declared as a possible recovery path, but normal requests are attempted first.

Normalized as an inline selector Source Definition using the current search/detail/chapter/image endpoint hints.

needsConnectorOrSelectorValidation.reason: Custom HTTP/API behavior is outside the current converted connector set. Needs native profile work instead of a blind selector import.

recommendedNextIteration: Device-validate Mangakakalot, Manganato, MangaKatana, Hiperdex, Hentai20, and Weeb Central search/detail/chapter/page routes after importing the curated source-master preview pack.
Review MangaFire separately because its Keiyoushi implementation is more custom than a direct declarative source profile.
